---
name: Connector Request
about: Request a new destination connector
labels: connector
assignees: ''
---

## Connector name

e.g. Braze, Mixpanel, Segment, BigQuery

## Service URL

Link to the destination service.

## Use case

Why do you need this connector? How many events/day would you send?

## Willing to contribute?

- [ ] Yes, I can build this connector
- [ ] No, requesting for someone else to build it
